capabilities.name: Batch Translation
capabilities.description: Creates translations from an external program for a given input document. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

capabilities.name: BOM Conversion
capabilities.description: Add or remove Unicode Byte-Order-Mark (BOM) in a text-based file. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

capabilities.name: Characters Quality Check
capabilities.description: Compare source and target for character inconsistencies. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Used Characters Listing
capabilities.description: Generate a list of all the characters in the source content of a set of documents. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Cleanup
capabilities.description: Cleans strings by normalizing quotes, punctuation, etc. ready for further processing. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Inline Codes Removal
capabilities.description: Removes inline codes from the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Segments to Text Units Converter
capabilities.description: Convert each aligned segment pair (for all target locales) to its own complete text unit Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Extraction Verification
capabilities.description: Verifies a raw document can be extracted, merged, then extracted again and produces the same set of events during both extractions. Expects: raw document. Sends back: unmodified raw document.

capabilities.name: Filter Events to Raw Document
capabilities.description: Combine filter events into a full document and pass it along as a raw document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: raw document or NO_OP if writing to a stream.

capabilities.name: Filter Events Writer
capabilities.description: Write out filter events into a document or stream.

capabilities.name: Raw Document to Filter Events
capabilities.description: Convert a raw document into filter events. Expects: raw document. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: RawDocument To OutputStream
capabilities.description: Write a RawDocument to an output stream.

capabilities.name: RawDocument Writer
capabilities.description: Write a RawDocument to an output file.

capabilities.name: Resource Simplifier
capabilities.description: Simplify resources. Simplification algorythm is format-specific. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Inline Codes Simplifier
capabilities.description: Merges adjacent inline codes in the source part of a text unit. Also where possible, moves leading and trailing codes of the source to the skeleton (Only for GenericSkeleton!). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Post-segmentation Inline Codes Simplifier
capabilities.description: Merges adjacent inline codes in the source and target part of a text unit. Also where possible, moves leading and trailing codes of the source to inter-segment TextParts. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Create Target
capabilities.description: Create target segment container. Optionally copy source content to the target. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Remove Target
capabilities.description: Remove targets in all or a given set of text units. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Text Unit Filtering
capabilities.description: Set the non-translatable flag to the text units accepted by the text unit filter specified in step's parameters. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Copy Or Move
capabilities.description: Copies or moves the listed files to the specified location. Expects: raw documents. Sends back: raw documents.

capabilities.name: Desegmentation
capabilities.description: Joins all segments into a single content. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Diff Leverage
capabilities.description: Compare two source documents (i.e., different versions) and copy the old target content when we find a match. Can be a monolingual and bi-lingual input or three monolingual inputs. Paragraphs (TextUnits) must align in all cases

capabilities.name: Encoding Conversion
capabilities.description: Convert the character set encoding of a text-based file. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

capabilities.name: Enrycher
capabilities.description: Applies Enrycher ITS annotations to the source content. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: External Command
capabilities.description: Execute an external command line.

capabilities.name: Format Conversion
capabilities.description: Converts the output of a filter into a specified file format. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Full-Width Conversion
capabilities.description: Convert the text units content of a document to or from full-width characters (zenkaku). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: General Quality Check
capabilities.description: Compare source and target for general quality. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Id-Based Aligner
capabilities.description: Align text units in two id-based files (e.g. Java properties). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Id-Based Copy
capabilities.description:
Copies the source text of the second input into the target of the first input based on matching id.
Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Image Modification
capabilities.description: Create a modified copy of image files. Expects: image raw document. Sends back: image raw document.

capabilities.name: Inconsistency Check
capabilities.description: Checks for source entries that are the same but have different translations or target entries that are the same but have different sources. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Inline Codes Quality Check
capabilities.description: Compare source and target for inline code differences. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Length Quality Check
capabilities.description: Compare source and target lengths and annotate those that seem mismatched. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Simple Batch Leveraging Step
capabilities.description: Simple and fast batch leveraging step that delegates to connectors

capabilities.name: Leveraging
capabilities.description: Leverage existing translation into the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Line-Break Conversion
capabilities.description: Convert the type of line-breaks in a text-based file. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

capabilities.name: Localizable Quality Check
capabilities.description: Compare source and target number, date and time patterns to assure they are localized. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Moses InlineText Extraction
capabilities.description: Creates a Moses InlineText file from the input document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Moses InlineText Leveraging
capabilities.description: Leverages an original source document with its corresponding Moses InlineText file. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Microsoft Batch Translation
capabilities.description: Annotates text units with Microsoft Translator matches or/and creates a TM from them. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Paragraph Alignment
capabilities.description: Align paragraphs (text units) between a source and a target document. Only TextUnit events are passed along - all other events are lost

capabilities.name: Pattern (regex) Quality Check
capabilities.description: Compare source and target for pattern differences. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Quality Check
capabilities.description: Compare source and target for quality. Expects: filter events or raw documents. Sends back: filter events or raw document.

capabilities.name: Rainbow Translation Kit Creation
capabilities.description: Generates a Rainbow translation kit for a batch of input documents. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events or raw document

capabilities.name: Rainbow Translation Kit Merging
capabilities.description: Post-process a Rainbow translation kit. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events or raw documents.

capabilities.name: Repetition Analysis
capabilities.description: Analyzes repetitions in input documents. Adds AltTranslationsAnnotation and RepetitiveSegmentAnnotation to a repetitive segment. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: RTF Conversion
capabilities.description: Remove the RTF layer from a text-based file. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

capabilities.name: Scoping Report
capabilities.description: Create a template-based scoping report based on word count and leverage annotations. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Search and Replace
capabilities.description: Performs search and replace on the entire file or the text units. Expects raw document or filter events. Sends back: raw document or filter events.

capabilities.name: Segmentation
capabilities.description: Apply SRX segmentation to the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Sentence Alignment
capabilities.description: Aligns sentences within text units (paragraphs). Produces sentence alignments as bilingual text units or a TMX file.

capabilities.name: Space Quality Check
capabilities.description: Compare and fix spaces around inline codes in target based on the source. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Term Extraction
capabilities.description: Extract a list of possible terms found in the source content. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Terminology Leveraging
capabilities.description: Leverage terminology into the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Text Modification
capabilities.description: Apply various modifications to the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: TM Import
capabilities.description: Import text into a new or existing Pensieve TM. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Tokenization Step
capabilities.description: Extracts tokens from the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Translation Comparison
capabilities.description: Compare the translated text units between several documents. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: TTX Joiner
capabilities.description: Rebuilds previously split TTX documents into their original documents. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

capabilities.name: TTX Splitter
capabilities.description: Splits a TTX document into several ones of roughly equal word count. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

capabilities.name: URI Conversion
capabilities.description: Encodes or Decodes URI escape sequences. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Whitespace Correction
capabilities.description: Correct whitespace following segment-ending punctuation when translating from  a space-delimited language (such as English) to a non-space-delimited language (Chinese or Japanese), or vice-versa. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Character Count
capabilities.description: Count the number of characters in the text units of a set of documents or/and in its parts. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Simple Word Count
capabilities.description: Annotates each text unit source with a total word count and gives total source word counts for batches Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Word Count
capabilities.description: Count the number of words in the text units of a set of documents or/and in its parts. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Alphanumeric Only Character Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the character count for text units that have been identified as containing only alphanumeric words. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Alphanumeric Only Word Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the word count for text units that have been identified as containing only alphanumeric words. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Exact Matched Character Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the character count for text units that have been matched unambiguously with a prior translation and thus require no translator input. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Exact Matched Word Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the word count for text units that have been matched unambiguously with a prior translation and thus require no translator input. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Fuzzy Match Character Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the character count for text units that have been fuzzy matched against a leveraged translation memory database. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Fuzzy Match Word Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the word count for text units that have been fuzzy matched against a leveraged translation memory database. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Leveraged Character Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the character count for text units that have been matched against a leveraged translation memory database. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Leveraged Word Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the word count for text units that have been matched against a leveraged translation memory database. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Measurement Only Character Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the character count from measurement-only text units. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Measurement Only Word Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the word count from measurement-only text units. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Numeric Only Character Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the character count for text units that have been identified as containing only numeric words. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Numeric Only Word Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the word count for text units that have been identified as containing only numeric words. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Protected Character Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the character count for text that has been marked as 'protected', or otherwise not translatable (XLIFF text enclosed in <mrk mtype="protected"> elements). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Protected Word Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the word count for text that has been marked as 'protected', or otherwise not translatable (XLIFF text enclosed in <mrk mtype="protected"> elements). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Repetition Matched Character Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the character count for repeating text units that have not been matched in any other form. Repetition matching is deemed to take precedence over fuzzy matching. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: GMX Repetition Matched Word Count
capabilities.description: An accumulation of the word count for repeating text units that have not been matched in any other form. Repetition matching is deemed to take precedence over fuzzy matching. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Concordance Character Count
capabilities.description: TM concordance or phrase match (usually a word or term only) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Concordance Word Count
capabilities.description: TM concordance or phrase match (usually a word or term only) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Document Context Match Character Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Document Context Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT and comes from a repeated segment in the same document or a different version of the same document. See also EXACT_PREVIOUS_VERSION Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Document Context Match Word Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Document Context Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT and comes from a repeated segment in the same document or a different version of the same document. See also EXACT_PREVIOUS_VERSION Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Local Context Match Character Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Local Context Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT and a small number of segments before and/or after. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Local Context Match Word Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Local Context Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT and a small number of segments before and/or after. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches text and codes exactly. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches text and codes exactly. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Previous Version Match Character Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Previous Version Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT and comes from the preceding version of the same document (i.e., if v4 is leveraged this match must come from v3, not v2 or v1!!). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Previous Version Match Word Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Previous Version Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT and comes from the preceding version of the same document (i.e., if v4 is leveraged this match must come from v3, not v2 or v1!!). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Repaired Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches text and codes exactly, but only after the result of some automated repair (e.g. number replacement, code repair, capitalization, punctuation etc.) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Repaired Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches text and codes exactly, but only after the result of some automated repair (e.g. number replacement, code repair, capitalization, punctuation etc.) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Structural Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT and the structural type of the segment (title, paragraph, list element etc.) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Structural Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT and the structural type of the segment (title, paragraph, list element etc.) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Text Only Match Character Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Text Only Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches text exactly, but there is a difference in one or more codes. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Text Only Previous Version Match Character Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Text Only Previous Version Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT_TEXT_ONLY and comes from a previous version of the same document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Text Only Previous Version Match Word Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Text Only Previous Version Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT_TEXT_ONLY and comes from a previous version of the same document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Text Only Unique Id Match Character Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Text Only Unique Id Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT_TEXT_ONLY and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Text Only Unique Id Match Word Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Text Only Unique Id Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT_TEXT_ONLY and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Text Only Match Word Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Text Only Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches text exactly, but there is a difference in one or more codes. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Unique Id Match Character Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Unique Id Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Exact Unique Id Match Word Count
capabilities.display_name: Exact Unique Id Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches EXACT and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.description: Matches FUZZY and comes from a previous version of the same document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.description: Matches FUZZY and comes from a previous version of the same document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Fuzzy Repaired Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches both text and/or codes partially and some automated repair (e.g. number replacement, code repair, capitalization, punctuation etc..) was applied to the target. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Fuzzy Repaired Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches both text and/or codes partially and some automated repair (e.g. number replacement, code repair, capitalization, punctuation etc..) was applied to the target. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Fuzzy Unique Id Match Character Count
capabilities.display_name: Fuzzy Unique Id Match Character Count
capabilities.description: Matches FUZZY and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: Fuzzy Unique Id Match Word Count
capabilities.display_name: Fuzzy Unique Id Match Word Count
capabilities.description: Matches FUZZY and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: MT Character Count
capabilities.description: Indicates a translation coming from an MT engine. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.name: MT Word Count
capabilities.description: Indicates a translation coming from an MT engine. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.description: Matches assembled from phrases in the TM or other resources (different algorithms could be used). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

capabilities.description: Matches assembled from phrases in the TM or other resources (different algorithms could be used). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.
